CustomField.description: Formula field that evaluates to true when retries are exhausted or manually dead-lettered. Dead-lettered calls are permanently failed and skipped by retry logic.
CustomField.formula: OR( AND( TEXT(Status__c) = "Failed", Retries__c >= MaxRetries__c ), ManualDeadLetter__c = TRUE )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: True when retries are exhausted or manually dead-lettered. Use the Recover action to re-queue.
CustomField.label: Dead Lettered
